_archive_note: Historical session snapshot; current guidance is in docs/development.md and docs/development-en.md.

deliverables.description: Standard manuscript v0.7 covering retrospective historical analysis of Soviet and Russian Indology with splotch demographic and structural hypotheses H1-H10 verified on сплошной 220-scholar cohort database.
Premium interactive client-side vis.js dashboard to zoom, pan, hover, filter, and search academic collaboration and co-presence ecology.
Comprehensive proso-biographical report, classifying young/independent scholars, dynamic affiliation shifts, online footprints, complete biography lifespans, and resolved names.
Normalized, referentially-sound relational SQL database mapping historical indology conferences, now featuring explicit place entities and lifespans.
Unified and packaged network structure representing 266 nodes and 4,704 edges.
Master list of all 220 deduplicated indologists with contribution splits.
Subset of St. Petersburg-centric scholars active only in Zograf Readings.
Subset of Moscow-centric scholars active only in Roerich Readings.
Detailed comparative report ranking top scholars and analyzing the cross-conference overlap cohort.

Sleek, responsive dark-mode dashboard with dual-language (Russian/English) support, elegant lifespan displays, and interactive SVG/vis.js charts (including Interactive Academic Collaboration Network, Cities Geography SVG map, Institutions Leaderboard, Thematic Word Cloud, Age Demographics, and Gender Composition).
Unified client-side database module generated automatically from SQLite with precompiled city counts, gender representation metrics, age group stats, and node/link network graph matrices.
CI/CD automated pipeline running twice-yearly (June 20 & Dec 20) to crawl, rebuild, and deploy updated portal.

architecture_details.scraper: scraper.py - Handles raw HTML caching and extraction from university & institute portals.
architecture_details.active_crawler: fetch_latest_programs.py - Automatically queries online news & announcements for latest conference files.
architecture_details.database_builder: build_and_populate_db.py - Normalizes, cleans Cyrillic initials, deduplicates identities, and populates SQL schemas.
architecture_details.analytics_engine: generate_analytics.py - Performs comparative analyses and exports targeted datasets.
architecture_details.network_json_packager: generate_network_json.py - Compiles 4,704 edges from CSV to network_data.json for client consumption.
architecture_details.site_generator: generate_site_data.py - Packs relational tables into high-performance JS data structures.
architecture_details.frontend: index.html + networks.html + site_data.json - Interactive glassmorphic single-page visualization portal with localized biographical information.

internationalization.features: Real-time state switcher for all tables, lifespans, headers, stats, timeline events, and interactive SVG charts without page reload.

automation.schedule: Twice a year (June 20 & December 20 at 00:00 UTC)
